---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for NEXUS
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-discussion']
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Summary
**A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.**

## 🎯 Problem Statement
**What problem does this feature solve? What need does it address?**

## 💭 Proposed Solution
**Describe the solution you'd like in detail.**

## 🔄 User Experience
**How would users interact with this feature?**

### User Flow
1. User does X
2. System responds with Y
3. User sees Z

### Interface Mockup
**If applicable, describe or sketch how this would look in the UI.**

## 🎨 Design Considerations
**How should this feature integrate with NEXUS's existing design?**

### Visual Design
- [ ] Should match existing theme system
- [ ] Needs new UI components
- [ ] Requires icon/visual elements
- [ ] Other: ___________

### Interaction Design
- [ ] Keyboard shortcuts needed
- [ ] Mouse/touch interactions
- [ ] Accessibility considerations
- [ ] Other: ___________

## ⚙️ Technical Considerations
**Any technical aspects to consider?**

### Implementation
- [ ] Requires new permissions
- [ ] Needs external APIs
- [ ] Affects performance
- [ ] Cross-browser compatibility
- [ ] Other: ___________

### Settings Integration
- [ ] Needs new settings options
- [ ] Should be toggleable on/off
- [ ] Requires configuration
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 🔍 Alternatives Considered
**Describe alternatives you've considered.**

## 📊 Use Cases
**Describe specific scenarios where this feature would be useful.**

### Primary Use Case
**The main scenario this feature addresses.**

### Secondary Use Cases
**Additional scenarios where this would be helpful.**

## 🎯 Success Criteria
**How would we know this feature is successful?**
- [ ] Solves the stated problem
- [ ] Easy to discover and use
- [ ] Doesn't impact performance
- [ ] Maintains accessibility standards
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 🚀 Priority
**How important is this feature to you?**
- [ ] Critical - Can't use NEXUS effectively without it
- [ ] High - Would significantly improve my experience
- [ ] Medium - Would be nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement

## 🌟 Inspiration
**Are there examples of this feature in other applications?**

## 📋 Additional Context
**Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request.**

## 🔧 Implementation Ideas
**If you have technical ideas about how this could be implemented, share them here.**

## 📝 Notes
**Any additional notes or considerations.**

---

**Thank you for helping make NEXUS better!** 🚀

**Note**: Feature requests will be discussed by the community before implementation. Popular and well-defined requests are more likely to be implemented.
